channel.title: Blog — Rodrigo Silva Ferreira
channel.description: Writing on developer tooling, AI-native development, and the Python ecosystem, with interactive marimo notebooks.

item.title: What a Questionnaire From 1986 Knows About AI Adoption
item.description: A reflection on the System Usability Scale, the quiet labor of using AI, and why the oldest instrument in usability research measures what our newest technology struggles with. With an interactive marimo notebook.
item.dc:creator: Rodrigo Silva Ferreira

item.title: The Raffle Ticket That Rewired How I Think About AI Products
item.description: A developer-tooling perspective on Amit Bahree's Generative AI in Action: why the book's real lesson is architecture, evaluation, and trust, not prompts.
item.dc:creator: Rodrigo Silva Ferreira
